ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition To Ascertain Beneficiaries And Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition To Ascertain Beneficiaries And Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Trust
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Continued To Jun-19-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-04-2012 Vacated

Petition To Ascertain Beneficiaries And Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Trust.
Off Calendar Jan-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-09-291997 Estate of Fred Ong.

Appearances: Elizabeth Herp for Nelson Szeto and Tony Szeto. Henry To for Ann Chan.

The Court advised Mr. To that a Substitution of Attorney was needed in the Estate matter. Mr. To stated that Ms. Chan withdrew from the settlement agreement. The Petition for Letters of Administration, the Petition for Probate of Will and the Petition to Ascertain Beneficiaries and Determine Entitlement to Distribution of Trust were referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial, (order for the same signed in open court). The Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Ascertain Beneficiaries And Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Trust.
Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Continued To Jan-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-09-291997 Estate of Fred Ong.

Appearances: Timothy Chambers for Ann Chan. Carrie Moulton for Tony Szeto and Nelson Szeto.

The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than January 13, 2012. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by January 17, 2012. Both matters were continued to and the Parties are to return on January 17, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Off Calendar

Petition To Ascertain Beneficiaries And Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Trust.
Off Calendar Jul-26-2011 Continued To Sep-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-09-291997 Estate of Fred Ong.

Appearances: Bruce Atwater for the Szeto Brothers.

Mr. Atwater stated that the elder abuse claim was filed in unlimited jusridiction in San Francisco, that there was no movement regarding resolution of the will contest and the 850 petition, that there was very little contact between Counsel and that he will be asking for the matters to be consolidated so that they can be heard together as the issues and the Parties overlap. In addition, Mr. Atwater stated that no answer was filed in the elder abuse matter and that new Counsel has been retained. The Court will put the matter over for a period of time when the civil case is at issue and then send both matters to a settlement conference. The matters were continued to September 27, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of whether the civil action is at issue and possible referal to a settlement conference of both actions.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Jul-26-2011 Continued To Sep-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Ascertain Beneficiaries And Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Trust.
Off Calendar Jun-14-2011 Continued To Jul-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number 291997 Estate of Fred Ong.

Appearances: Timothy Chambers for Ann Chan. Bruce Atwater for Nelson Szeto.

Mr. Chambers stated that they were unsuccessful in scheduling mediation. Mr. Atwater stated that he filed a new comlpaint alledging elder abuse/financial fraud. The matters were continued to July 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to see if new Counsel is coming on the elder abuse matter and if a response is filed. If the Parties have not agreed on mediation, the Court will send them to a settlement conference.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harrison.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Jun-14-2011 Continued To Jul-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar May-03-2011 Continued To Jun-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Ascertain Beneficiaries And Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Trust.
Off Calendar May-03-2011 Continued To Jun-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-09-291997 Estate of Fred Ong.

Timothy Cahmbers for Ann Chan.

Mr. Chambers stated that they failed to schedule mediation, that he feels that they can settle and that mediation is scheduled on May 13th with Mr. Conrad. Both matters were continued to June 14, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Ascertain Beneficiaries And Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Trust.
Off Calendar Feb-01-2011 Continued To May-03-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-09-291997 Estate of Fred Ong.

Appearances: Bruce Atwater specially appearing for Charlene Johnson for Nelson Szeto and Tony Szeto. Tim Chambers for Ann Chan.

Mr. Chambers requested a continuance stating that he just substituted in this week and that a discovery matter and a dispute regarding a document demand were still pending. In addition, Mr. Chambers stated that he intends to file a financial elder abuse matter in the civil court. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation (orders referring the matters to Pro Bono Mediation signed in open Court). Mediation must be completed no later than April 29, 2011. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by April 26, 2011. A status conference in both matters was set for May 3, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The matters were also continued to May 3, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for trial setting.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Ascertain Beneficiaries And Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Trust.
Off Calendar Dec-07-2010 Continued To Feb-01-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Hearing held - matter was heard with case #291997, see mini minutes on this date.

Petition To Ascertain Beneficiaries And Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Trust.
Off Calendar Oct-19-2010 Continued To Dec-07-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-09-291997 Estate of Fred Ong.

Appearances: Norman Lew for Ann Chan. Bruce Hall Atwater for Nelson Szeto and Tony Szeto.

Mr. Atwater stated that discovery was still in process, that he received voluminous financial records, that depositions still needed to be completed and asked for more time. The matter was continued to December 7, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery and for trial setting.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR#5220. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Ascertain Beneficiaries And Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Trust.
Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Continued To Oct-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number 291997 Estate of Fred Ong.

Appearances: Bruce Atwater for Neslon Szeto. Norman Lew for Anne Chan.

Mr. Atwater stated that the matter was not ready to be set for trial, that the subpoenas for the financial documents had been answered, and that they were still waiting for the statements from Schwab and Washington Mutual. The matter was continued to October 19, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Petition To Ascertain Beneficiaries And Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Trust.
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Continued To Aug-31-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 291997 The Estate of Fred Ong.

Appearances: Norman Lew for Anne Chan. Bruce Atwater for Nelson Szeto.

Counsel stated that additional discovery needed to be conducted and that they agreed to a 60 day continuance. Both matters were continued to August 31, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery and for trial setting.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition To Ascertain Beneficiaries And Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Trust.
Off Calendar May-12-2010 Continued To Jun-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Ascertain Beneficiaries And Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Trust.
Off Calendar Mar-10-2010 Continued To May-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 291997 The Estate of Fred Ong.

Appearances: Norman Lew for Ann Chan. Tom Peraic for Nelson Szeto and Tony Szeto.

Mr. Lew stated that the Estate of Fred Ong mediated prior to filing of the Yee Trust and suggested further mediation. Mr. Peraic stated that he had no objection to further mediation, that he felt it was proper to consolidate the actions and that there was no petition for consolidation. In addition, Mr. Peraic requested a trial date be set, suggested an evidentiary hearing on the Trust matter, stated that the probate matter may become moot and that both matters would take about four days for trial. The Court stated that discovery should be conducted now and suggested Counsel meet and confer about outstanding discovery. The matters were continued to May 12, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery and for referral to the Department of the Presiding Judge for trial setting. The request to consolidate the matters was granted. Mr. Peraic is to prepare the order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
